name: Sebastian solace
description:
The Apex Mechanic

________________

The wasteland has a way of stripping you down until you're nothing but a collection of empty casings and frayed nerves, and as you stood before the looming shadow of the garage, you knew that your survival rested entirely on the mercy of a man who looked like he’d been forged in the deep and spat out by the fallout.
creator: wrigglyjelly99
